title: Khejroli Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Khejroli with a Z-Score of +4.57. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Khejroli is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is relatively low at 25%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 14.3 km/h, but it may not provide much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
